recent.task: Improved footer on desktop: gold border accent, official Facebook SVG icon, logo + tagline layout, 8-pt grid spacing

Rebuilt Brain tab: vault-native graph (36 nodes, 84 wikilink edges, 7 communities). Dropped graphify semantic extraction. Orphans removed. Every node = real vault file, every edge = [[wikilink]]. Hubs sized by inbound refs.

Built unified Command Centre dashboard: pipeline (Airtable live), operations (cron health), knowledge (decisions + sales brain). NFS design system. 2-hourly cron refresh (script-only, zero LLM tokens).
Extended crm-update-send.py: now creates Messages records on every send (Prospect + Messages + Verify = full reconciliation). Cold-email skill updated. Messages table gap closed permanently.
Backfilled 10 missing Messages records for calibration campaign. All sent dates reconciled with Prospects table. Cinderellas bounce confirmed (marked Lost). CRM audit trail now complete.

Sent calibration Email 1 to 3 marketing agencies: Click Click Media, OMG, Next&Co. All Pipeline → Outreach Active. WebAlive replaced with Next&Co (overlap risk). Pre-flight checklist operational. Predictions recorded.
Built gmail_auth.py shared auth layer (eliminates recurring token expiry). Replaced Cinderellas (invalid email) with Sydney Office Clean in calibration. 3 agency Email 1 drafts pending research.

Created Atlas Learning Framework — systematic self-improvement methodology. Added 'Evidence before optimisation' as SOUL directive #11. Email 2 drafts prepared (variable-isolated). CRM now self-updating.
